subcodes.first_line: O Moses! Hearken unto the call of the All-Knowing, Who, though encompassed by grievous trials, abideth in surpassing joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کلیم اسمع ندآء العلیم و انه حینئذ علی فرح عظیم ولو یکون فی بلاء شدید
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God
